title: Rich Creamy Middle Eastern Lamb Mansaf
description: A rich, creamy, and flavorful Mansaf dish featuring tender lamb, melted mozzarella, and a sweet and spicy sauce.
instructions: Season the lamb with salt, black pepper, allspice, and cumin.
Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set it aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter to the pot and sauté the chopped onion until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth and heavy cream, scraping the bottom of the pot to release any browned bits.
Return the lamb to the pot and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the shredded mozzarella cheese and cook until melted and creamy.
Serve the lamb hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
